Name: SQL - Create Database Login and User using SMO
Description: Requires SMO to be installed on the machine where this step will be run.

Parameters.Name: SMO_SqlServer
Parameters.Label: Database Server Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the to create the login for.

Parameters.Name: SMO_SqlDatabase
Parameters.Label: Database Name
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the database. The created Login and User will get the role dbowner by defaultfor this database.

Parameters.Name: SMO_LoginName
Parameters.Label: Windows Login Name
Parameters.HelpText: The login name to create a login and user in the database for. In our projects we use integrated security - you should too.

Parameters.Name: SMO_SqlRole
Parameters.Label: Database Role Names
Parameters.HelpText: We default to `db_owner`, you might want to change this to suit your needs. You may specify multiple roles separated by a comma (e.g. `db_datareader,db_datawriter`)
